date_notes: Announcement made Aug 18; reported Aug 19. Using event date, not publication date.
title_en: Province reverses lab privatization, transfers operations back to public system
title_fr: La province inverse la privatisation des laboratoires et retransfère les activités au secteur public
description_en: The government announces it will transfer DynaLife staff, equipment and property to the public Alberta Precision Laboratories, reversing the privatization. The financial cost of the reversal was not disclosed at the time of announcement.

opposition_response.name: David Shepherd
opposition_response.description: Official Opposition health critic called the reversal a vindication of NDP warnings and demanded a full accounting of costs.

verification_notes: R-006 removed from source_refs (reclassified to Tier 4 finding-tool in v0.5.1 — usable for narrative location only, not citation). R-005 (Globe) is the citation; no byline in original (wire). EVT remains established.
